message:
fix: apply all revision notes to implementation plan

Critical fixes applied:
- RecordResponse now takes response body + provider for proper fingerprinting
- copyLogToForkPoint parses JSONL and stops at fork sequence
- streamResponse accumulates text for fingerprinting streaming responses
- extractDeltaText handles both Anthropic and OpenAI streaming formats
- ExtractAssistantMessage with proper error handling
- isLocalhost uses strings.HasPrefix for safety
- Graceful shutdown with signal handling
- LogFork method called from createForkSession
- NewSessionManager accepts logger parameter
- Added TestForkCopiesLogCorrectly test
- Updated all test cases with response bodies
- Added Important Implementation Notes section

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
